notes: What's Changed · * ci: grant contents: write to the release workflow by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/yahoo-keykey-2/pull/21 · * fix: candidate text-size menu now persists; v1.4.1 by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/yahoo-keykey-2/pull/22

What's Changed · * fix(sparkle): point SUFeedURL at /yahoo-keykey-2/appcast.xml by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/yahoo-keykey-2/pull/15 · * Add README ("Yahoo KeyKey 2") by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/yahoo-keykey-2/pull/16 · * chore: remove CLAUDE.md from the public repo by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/yahoo-keykey-2/pull/19

Yahoo KeyKey 2 v1.3.4 · - Cleaner candidate window: removed the static **SHIFT + NUM** header (it was decorative and conveyed no state). The popup now shows the numbered candidates and the page indicator only. · Install · - **First time:** download **YahooKeyKey2-1.3.4.pkg**, double-click, follow the installer (installs to `~/Library/Input Methods/`, no admin). Log out and back in to activate.

Yahoo KeyKey 2 v1.3.3 · - Redesigned candidate window in the style of the classic Yahoo! KeyKey: rounded bordered box, **SHIFT + NUM** header, numbered two-column rows, and a **▼ page/total** footer. Colours follow the system appearance. · Install · - **First time:** download **YahooKeyKey2-1.3.3.pkg**, double-click, and follow the installer (installs to `~/Library/Input Methods/`, no admin password). Log out and back in to activate.

Fixes 檢查更新… (Check for Updates) doing nothing: the input method is a background (LSUIElement) agent, so Sparkle's update windows were opening behind the foreground app and never came forward. They now activate to the front. · Also includes the purple Yahoo! KeyKey input-source icon from 1.3.1. · Note: because the 1.3.0/1.3.1 updater couldn't show its window, this build must be installed once manually (open the DMG, copy to ~/Library/Input Methods/, log out/in). After that, 檢查更新… works. · - `YahooKeyKey2-1.3.2.zip` — Sparkle update payload / drag-install.

Input-source picker now shows the purple Yahoo! KeyKey icon for 倉頡 and 速成 (previously a generic gray placeholder). · Auto-update: v1.3.0 users get this via Sparkle (檢查更新…). The input method takes effect after the IME restarts — toggle the input source or log out/in. · - `YahooKeyKey2-1.3.1.zip` — Sparkle update payload / drag-install. · - `YahooKeyKey2-1.3.1.dmg` — first-time download.

What's new · - **Auto-update (Sparkle)** — the app now checks for and installs updates itself. Use **檢查更新…** in the input menu, or it checks daily. (First Sparkle build; v1.2.2 users update to this once manually, then auto-update after.) · - **Space pages candidates** — Space now flips candidate/association pages (wrapping), matching the original Yahoo! KeyKey; numbers select, Enter commits. · Apple Silicon · macOS 12+ · signed + notarized. Download the **.pkg** (first install) or, with v1.3.0+, just use 檢查更新.

Bug-fix release for the Cangjie (倉頡) / Simplex (速成) input method. Signed + notarized (Apple Silicon). · Changes · - **App icon** is now the traditional Yahoo! KeyKey "Y!" logo (also used for the 倉頡 / 速成 entries in the input menu). · Install
